title: Senior Doctor - Siemens Healthineers India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Siemens Healthineers India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India:
Siemens Healthineers India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
